description: Style NoteA casual wardrobe is built around basic pieces like this top from flying machine. Team this college style top with a structured blazer and fitted denims to polish your look with grown-up glam!Product DetailsGrey scoop neck top with distressed edges on neckline and cuffs, has cap sleeves and print on the chest with glitterMaterial and Care100% cottonDelicate machine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryHang dry in shadeWarm iron on reverseDo not iron on print or embroiderySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
